concerns.text: Task T022 (stratification logic) is placed in Phase 4 (US2) but depends on the data split and feature matrix generated in Phase 3 (US1, T018). The task description implies splitting data into bins, but the source data (feature matrix) is not produced until T018 completes. T022 must be ordered after T018.

Task T023 (permutation importance) depends on the trained model from T021. While T021 is in the same phase, T023 is listed before T021 in the implementation list. T023 must follow T021 to ensure the model artifact exists before evaluation.

Task T029 (internal validation) depends on the model output from US2 (Phase 4). The task is correctly placed in Phase 5, but the dependency on the specific model artifact from T021/T026 is implicit. Ensure T029 explicitly references the model artifact path generated in T026.

Task T016 references a 'reaction lookup table (YAML)' but the creation of this YAML file is not explicitly defined as a separate task or a sub-task of T004 (which defines the schema). T016 assumes the file exists. A task to generate/populate `code/utils/reactions.yaml` with the actual reaction data must precede T016.

Task T014 (descriptor extraction) is marked [P] (parallel-safe) but depends on the ingestion logic in T012/T013 to provide the raw data structures. While T014 is in the same phase, the [P] tag implies it can run independently of T012/T013, which is false. Remove [P] or clarify that it runs after T013.
